items.en: In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful
items.verse: إِنَّهُۥ مِن سُلَيْمَـٰنَ وَإِنَّهُۥ بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
items.verseEn: Indeed, it is from Solomon, and indeed, it is [i.e., reads]: 'In the name of Allāh, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,

items.en: And We have not sent you except as a bringer of good tidings and a warner
items.verseEn: And We have not sent you, [O Muḥammad], except as a bringer of good tidings and a warner.

items.en: And among them is one who comes to you with it
items.verse: وَإِذَا جَآءَهُمْ أَمْرٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْنِ أَوِ ٱلْخَوْفِ أَذَاعُوا۟ بِهِۦ ۖ وَلَوْ رَدُّوهُ إِلَى ٱلرَّسُولِ وَإِلَىٰٓ أُو۟لِى ٱلْأَمْرِ مِنْهُمْ لَعَلِمَهُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَسْتَنۢبِطُونَهُۥ مِنْهُمْ ۗ وَلَوْلَا فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَتُهُۥ لَٱتَّبَعْتُمُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًۭا
items.verseEn: And when there comes to them something [i.e., information] about [public] security or fear, they spread it around. But if they had referred it back to the Messenger or to those of authority among them, then the ones who [can] draw correct conclusions from it would have known about it. And if not for the favor of Allāh upon you and His mercy, you would have followed Satan, except for a few.

items.ar: وَمَا يَنطِقُ عَنِ الْهَوَىٰ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا وَحْيٌ يُوحَىٰ
items.en: Nor does he speak from [his own] inclination. It is not but a revelation revealed
items.verseEn: Nor does he speak from [his own] inclination.

categories.name: أَلْقَابُ جَنَّاتِ الْجَنَّةِ
categories.nameEn: Epithets of the Gardens of Paradise

items.verse: رَبَّنَا وَأَدْخِلْهُمْ جَنَّـٰتِ عَدْنٍ ٱلَّتِى وَعَدتَّهُمْ وَمَن صَلَحَ مِنْ ءَابَآئِهِمْ وَأَزْوَٰجِهِمْ وَذُرِّيَّـٰتِهِمْ ۚ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
items.verseEn: Our Lord, and admit them to gardens of perpetual residence which You have promised them and whoever was righteous among their forefathers, their spouses and their offspring. Indeed, it is You who is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

items.verse: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتُ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
items.verseEn: Indeed, those who believe and do righteous deeds - for them are the Gardens of Pleasure,

items.verse: أَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ فَلَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتُ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ نُزُلًۢا بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
items.verseEn: As for those who believed and did righteous deeds, for them will be the Gardens of Refuge as accommodation for what they used to do.

items.verse: قُلْ أَذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ أَمْ جَنَّةُ ٱلْخُلْدِ ٱلَّتِى وُعِدَ ٱلْمُتَّقُونَ ۚ كَانَتْ لَهُمْ جَزَآءًۭ وَمَصِيرًۭا
items.verseEn: Say, "Is that better or the Garden of Eternity which is promised to the righteous? It will be for them a reward and destination.

items.verse: وَمَن يَهْدِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن مُّضِلٍّ ۗ أَلَيْسَ ٱللَّهُ بِعَزِيزٍۢ ذِى ٱنتِقَامٍۢ
items.verseEn: And whoever Allāh guides - for him there is no misleader. Is not Allāh Exalted in Might and Owner of Retribution?

items.verse: يَوْمَ هُم بَـٰرِزُونَ ۖ لَا يَخْفَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ مِنْهُمْ شَىْءٌۭ ۚ لِّمَنِ ٱلْمُلْكُ ٱلْيَوْمَ ۖ لِلَّهِ ٱلْوَٰحِدِ ٱلْقَهَّارِ
items.verseEn: The Day they come forth nothing concerning them will be concealed from Allāh. To whom belongs [all] sovereignty this Day? To Allāh, the One, the Prevailing.

items.verse: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مُنذِرٌۭ ۖ وَمَا مِنْ إِلَـٰهٍ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ٱلْوَٰحِدُ ٱلْقَهَّارُ
items.verseEn: Say, [O Muḥammad], "I am only a warner, and there is not any deity except Allāh, the One, the Prevailing,

items.verse: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا نَجَّيْنَا صَـٰلِحًۭا وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ بِرَحْمَةٍۢ مِّنَّا وَمِنْ خِزْىِ يَوْمِئِذٍ ۗ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلْقَوِىُّ ٱلْعَزِيزُ
items.verseEn: So when Our command came, We saved Ṣāliḥ and those who believed with him, by mercy from Us, and [saved them] from the disgrace of that day. Indeed, it is your Lord who is the Powerful, the Exalted in Might.
Arise [to pray] the night, except for a little -

items.verse: إِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبْحًۭا طَوِيلًۭا
items.verseEn: Indeed, for you by day is prolonged occupation.

items.verse: فَالِقُ ٱلْإِصْبَاحِ وَجَعَلَ ٱلَّيْلَ سَكَنًۭا وَٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ حُسْبَانًۭا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْعَلِيمِ
items.verseEn: [He is] the cleaver of daybreak and has made the night for rest and the sun and moon for calculation. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.

items.verse: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَسَخَّرَ ٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ ۖ فَأَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
items.verseEn: If you asked them, "Who created the heavens and earth and subjected the sun and the moon?" they would surely say, "Allāh." Then how are they deluded?

harf.hint: An attribute of Allah describing the One who forgives sins and conceals faults
harf.arabicVerse: غَافِرِ ٱلذَّنۢبِ وَقَابِلِ ٱلتَّوْبِ شَدِيدِ ٱلْعِقَابِ ذِى ٱلطَّوْلِ ۖ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ إِلَيْهِ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
harf.verse: 40:3 - The forgiver of sin, acceptor of repentance, severe in punishment, owner of abundance. There is no deity except Him; to Him is the destination.

deduction.title: The Solitary Retreat
deduction.intro: In the annals of divine favor, there exists a soul of unparalleled purity, set apart from their people to seek solitude in a sacred direction. Little did they know that this seclusion would bring forth a sign for all worlds, a trial of faith that would be spoken of for eternity.
clues: I was dedicated to a life of service before my birth.
I was placed under the guardianship of a noble prophet.
I was sustained with provisions from Allah that amazed my guardian.
I withdrew from my family to an eastern place.
An angel appeared to me in the form of a perfect man, bringing news of a pure son.
When I returned with my newborn, my people accused me, but the infant spoke in my defense.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Miraculous conception and birth of a son
Being swallowed by a giant fish
trial.answer: Miraculous conception and birth of a son

location.label: Key Element
options: The rock from which water gushed

outcome.label: Outcome
options: An infant spoke in defense of a mother
The fire became cool and safe
The whale vomited onto the shore
The ark landed on a mountain
outcome.answer: An infant spoke in defense of a mother

deduction.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مَرْيَمَ إِذِ ٱنتَبَذَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا مَكَانًۭا شَرْقِيًّۭا
deduction.verse: And mention, [O Muḥammad], in the Book [the story of] Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place toward the east. (19:16)

scramble.hint: The honored status of those who sacrifice their lives for the sake of Allah - they are not gone, but alive with their Lord, receiving their reward.
scramble.arabic: وَلَا تَحْسَبَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ قُتِلُوا۟ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ أَمْوَٰتًۢا ۚ بَلْ أَحْيَآءٌ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ يُرْزَقُونَ
scramble.verseEn: And never think of those who have been killed in the cause of Allāh as dead. Rather, they are alive with their Lord, receiving provision,
